Cello Lessons in Santa Rosa & Online

Santa Rosa cello lessons tailored to you—learn with confidence, play with joy, and grow your technique every step of the way.

Schedule a Lesson

A Personalized Approach to Learning

I believe that learning an instrument is a journey of discovery. My studio provides a supportive, high-performance environment where students are encouraged to explore their musical voice while maintaining a disciplined focus on the mechanics of string playing.

  • vibration

    Building foundations

    Core principles that ensure a lifetime of musical growth.

  • health_and_safety

    Healthy technique

    Ergonomic posture and movement to prevent tension and injury.

  • school

    Audition prep

    Strategic preparation for regional orchestras and college entrance.

  • auto_awesome

    Engaging lessons

    Curriculum that balances classical rigour with musical enjoyment.

10+ Years of Pedagogy

Who I Work With

Children & Teens

Inspiring the next generation through creative, structured learning paths.

Adult Learners

Tailored lessons for hobbyists returning to the instrument or starting late.

Beginners to Advanced

From first scales to complex concertos and orchestral excerpts.

Audition Preparation

Focused intensive study for competitive regional and national positions.

Studio Environment

Lessons take place in my dedicated Santa Rosa home studio, designed for optimal acoustics. Online lessons via high-definition Zoom audio are also available worldwide.

location_on Santa Rosa, CA
music_note
Professional Journey

Background & Experience

With over a decade of dedicated teaching and performance experience, I bring a wealth of knowledge to every lesson, ensuring each student receives high-caliber instruction.

Lesson Details

Investment in your musical future. All new students start with a complimentary 15-minute consultation.

Introductory

30 Minutes

$45 /session

Ideal for young beginners or those with busy schedules.

Recommended
Standard

45 Minutes

$65 /session

The perfect balance for intermediate students to refine technique.

Advanced

60 Minutes

$80 /session

Comprehensive deep-dive for advanced players and audition prep.

Get Started

Whether you’re new to cello or looking to continue your studies, I am excited to help you achieve your musical goals. Fill out the form below, and I will reach out within 48 hours to schedule your consultation.
